popularStory.headline: Judson, Lieutenant Joseph story 1619-1690
popularStory.description: When Lieutenant Joseph Judson was born in 1619 in Moorside, Yorkshire, England, his father, WILLIAM, was 26 and his mother, Grace, was 22. He married Sarah Porter on October 24, 1644, in Windsor, Conn …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Joseph Judson於1619年2月24日出生在英國越可爾吉可比姆希德時，他的父親William Judson26歲，母親Grace Porter24歲。他於1644年10月24日與Sarah Porter結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他於1640年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾葛拉芙頓史達科特。他去世於1690年10月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德龐培勞格 普藍塔迪享年71歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州費艾費爾德史達科特笛卡爾 從雷加納爾 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joseph Judson于1619年2月24日出生在英国越可爾吉可比姆希德时，他的父亲William Judson26岁，母亲Grace Porter24岁。他于1644年10月24日与Sarah Porter结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他于1640年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾葛拉芙頓史達科特。他去世于1690年10月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德龐培勞格 普藍塔迪享年71岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州費艾費爾德史達科特笛卡爾 從雷加納爾 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Judson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Judd + -son.

variants.name: Getson
meanings: English (Middlesex): variant of Jutson, either a habitational name from Jurston, in Chagford (Devon), or a variant of Judson . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Judd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Judde, Jutte, a pet form of Jordan .

nameMeanings.name: Joseph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the biblical Hebrew name Yosef, meaning ‘(God) shall add (another son)’. This was borne by the favourite son of Jacob, whose brothers became jealous of him and sold him into slavery (Genesis 37). He was taken to Egypt, where he rose to become chief steward to Pharaoh, and was eventually reconciled to his brothers when they came to buy corn during a seven-year famine (Genesis 43–7). In the New Testament Joseph is the name of the husband of the Virgin Mary. It is also borne by a rich Jew, Joseph of Arimathea (Matthew 27:57; Mark 15:43; Luke 23:50; John 19:38), who took Jesus down from the Cross, wrapped him in a shroud, and buried him in a rock tomb. According to medieval legend, Joseph of Arimathea brought the Holy Grail to Britain. The name was uncommon in Britain in the Middle Ages but was revived in the mid 16th century and had become popular by the 1630s, remaining so ever since.

variants.name: Josef
meanings: , Dutch, Scandinavian, and Czech spelling of   Joseph  , now also in use in the English‐speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Oldest grave seen in the memorials list.

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.

The founders of Woodbury came from Stratford, Connecticut, in the early 1670s. Ancient Woodbury consisted of the present towns of Woodbury, Southbury, Roxbury, Bethlehem, most of Washington and parts of Middlebury and Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Joseph Judson was born on 24 February 1619, in Kirkbymoorside, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Judson, was 26 and his mother, Grace Porter, was 24. He married Sarah Porter on 24 October 1644. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. He lived in Stratford, Grafton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America in 1640. He died on 8 October 1690, in Pomperaug Plantation, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 71, and was buried in Old Congregational Burying Ground, Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joseph Judson est né le 24 février 1619, à Kirkbymoorside, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Judson, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Grace Porter, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Porter le 24 octobre 1644. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Il a vécu à Stratford, Grafton, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1640. Il est décédé le 8 octobre 1690, à Pomperaug Plantation, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Old Congregational Burying Ground, Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, États-Unis.

Oktober 1690 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Pomperaug Plantation, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Old Congregational Burying Ground, Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joseph Judson è nato il il 24 febbraio 1619 nel Kirkbymoorside, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William Judson, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Grace Porter, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Porter il 24 ottobre 1644. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie. Vissuto a Stratford, Grafton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America nel 1640. Morì il 8 ottobre 1690, nel Pomperaug Plantation, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Old Congregational Burying Ground, Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Joseph Judsonが1619年2月24日にイギリスヨークシュアイアキルクブイモオルシドで生まれた時，父William Judsonは26歳，母Grace Porterは24歳であった。1644年10月24日にSarah Porterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1640年にはイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアグラフトンストラトフォードに住んでいた。彼は1690年10月8日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ファイルフィールドポンペラウグ プランタティオンで71歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ファイルフィールドストラトフォードオルド コングレガティオナル ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joseph Judson(이)가 1619년 2월 24일 영국 요르크실르 커k비모르시드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Judson(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Grace Porter(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1644년 10월 24일 Sarah Porter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 1640년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 그라프턴 스트라트퍼드에서 살았다. 그는 1690년 10월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 파어필드 폼페라그 플랜타티언에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스트라트퍼드 드 콘그레가티오널 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joseph Judson nasceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1619, em Kirkbymoorside, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Judson, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Grace Porter, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Porter em 24 de outubro de 1644. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele viveu em Stratford, Grafton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America em 1640. Ele faleceu em 8 de outubro de 1690, em Pomperaug Plantation, Fairfield, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Congregational Burying Ground, Stratford, Fairfield, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joseph Judson родился 24 февраля 1619 г. в местности киркбимурсид, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Judson было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Grace Porter, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Porter 24 октября 1644 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Он жил в местности стратфорд, графтон, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1640 году. Он умер 8 октября 1690 г. в местности помпирауг плантатион, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности олд конгрегатиональ буринг гроунд, стратфорд, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joseph Judson nació el 24 de febrero de 1619, en Kirkbymoorside, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Judson, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Grace Porter, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sarah Porter el 24 de octubre de 1644. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas. Vivió en Stratford, Grafton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America en 1640. Murió el 8 de octubre de 1690, en Pomperaug Plantation, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Old Congregational Burying Ground, Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
